hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '\bgit[[:space:]]+(commit|push|merge|rebase|reset|cherry-pick|revert|tag)\b|\bgh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+(create|merge|close)\b' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Project hard gate: commits, pushes, PRs and history rewrites require explicit user approval. Do not proceed unless the user asked for this specific action."}}' || true
